subject: Adding the CA service container
commit_message:
Adding the CA service container

Adding the dockerfile and required scripts
to implement CA service container functionality

Issue-ID: AAF-342
Change-Id: I8ea086008d0d8e50bfad3886c741ba21642ac974
Signed-off-by: Pramod Raghavendra Jayathirth <pramod.raghavendra.jayathirth@intel.com>

Patch Set 5:

- Split this patch into two patches. One containing only application files and other containing binary files.
- You have to install certain packages by running install.sh file before you can use tools like pkcs11-tool.
- Add the four generated files and out_parent_public to the application folder
